Aggregated execute batches: completed 2/2.
Batch 1: Implemented T1 in `src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorShell.tsx` and checkpointed batch progress in `.megaplan/plans/smooth-the-video-editor-20260406-0728/execution_batch_1.json`. The ResizeObserver now remains active through pane lock/unlock padding animation, `condensed` is driven by `forceCondensed || tooSmall`, and both layout branches now use lightweight Tailwind enter/opacity transitions with the standard layout also animating `grid-template-rows`. No test suite was run in this batch because T2 is the verification batch.
Batch 2: Verification completed for T2. The full `src/tools/video-editor/` vitest target passed, the full `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` file passed, no test updates were needed, and a throwaway script verified the current `VideoEditorShell.tsx` condensed expression behaves as required before being deleted. I also checkpointed batch 2 progress in `.megaplan/plans/smooth-the-video-editor-20260406-0728/execution_batch_2.json`. Manual UI smoke testing was not performed in this terminal-only pass.

task_updates.executor_notes: Removed `isGenerationsPaneLocked` from the ResizeObserver guard, the effect dependency array, and the `condensed` calculation so condensed mode now follows ResizeObserver-driven `tooSmall` state during the animated padding change. Added lightweight Tailwind enter/opacity transitions to both layout `<main>` branches and a `grid-template-rows` transition with `ease-smooth` on the standard layout. Verified `isGenerationsPaneLocked` remains imported and is still used for the Editor button path.

Ran the full `src/tools/video-editor/` vitest target and the full `LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` file; both passed without needing any test updates. Ran a throwaway verification script against the current `VideoEditorShell.tsx` source to confirm the live `condensed` expression is `forceCondensed || tooSmall`, including the required cases where a locked generations pane no longer forces condensed mode by itself, then deleted the script.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed in `src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorShell.tsx` that `isGenerationsPaneLocked` is removed from the ResizeObserver guard (line 139), effect dependency array (line 146), and `condensed` calculation (line 148), while remaining imported and used for the Editor button behavior (lines 60 and 297).

Yes. `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/ --reporter=verbose` passed with 32 files and 127 tests, and `npx vitest run src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx --reporter=verbose` passed with 1 file and 5 tests. No tests were updated because nothing failed due to the ResizeObserver-driven condensed change.
